name: daybreak-solana
description: Daybreak Solana - security audit tool combining static analysis with focused LLM agents

scripts.dev:mock:lan: node scripts/seed-mock-data.js && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npx --workspace=client vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5174"
scripts.docker:setup: docker compose up -d --build && docker compose exec daybreak claude auth login
